mapper.select: SELECT c.*, t.name AS head_teacher_name FROM clazz c LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.head_teacher_id = t.id ORDER BY c.id
SELECT c.*, t.name AS head_teacher_name FROM clazz c LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.head_teacher_id = t.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT id FROM clazz WHERE head_teacher_id = #{headTeacherId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clazz (name, grade, head_teacher_id, room, capacity, description, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{grade}, #{headTeacherId}, #{room}, #{capacity}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE clazz SET name=#{name}, grade=#{grade}, head_teacher_id=#{headTeacherId}, room=#{room}, capacity=#{capacity}, description=#{description}, status=#{status} WHERE id = #{id}
